title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Roche India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Roche India
jsonLd.description:
Roche India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Roche India:
Roche India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Roche India!
